case_title: JOAKIM SILVANDERSSON VS. THOMAS ELDAN ROE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2010 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY SILVANDERSSON, JOAKIM ROE, THOMAS ELDAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: . VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVANDERSSON, JOAKIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROE, THOMAS ELDAN PLAINTIFF DID NOT MAKE OUT CLAIM FOR PARTIAL RETURN OF LOAN FUNDS; LOAN MODIFICATION WAS VALID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,552.87 FILED BY SILVANDERSSON, JOAKIM AS TO DEFENDANT ROE, THOMAS ELDAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-28-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROE, THOMAS ELDAN
